content.en:
The Forbidden Void Bead is a top-level treasure of the forbidden category, containing the ability to suppress and prohibit, once the Forbidden Void Bead is activated, it is enough to suppress a void, and even enemies who are proficient in spatial talent are difficult to leave.

Of course, the Forbidden Sky Bead is not the top top level treasure, it can only be regarded as an ordinary top level treasure, but it is enough for Ye Tian to use.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian left the Flame Heavenly Palace with the Forbidden Sky Bead and returned to the Heavenly Pavilion.

After returning, Ye Tian immediately went into retreat.

He wants to use the forbidden void bead as an embryo and create a second deity with the talent of the deity.

This process takes a long time, but as long as Ye Tian accelerates by 1,000 times, it won't take long for the outside world.

"According to my calculations, at most 10,000 years is enough to form the second deity, which is equivalent to the outside world has only passed ten years, ten years is not a long time, and the situation in the outside world should not change anything. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In a retreat chamber.

Ye Tian first opened the formation to prevent anyone from prying eyes, and then took out the forbidden void bead.

Ye Tian held the Forbidden Sky Bead in both hands, opened the talent of the deity, and countless rays of light converged in his hands, invading the Forbidden Sky Bead.

Then, the Forbidden Void Bead began to change, slowly began to decompose, and once the decomposition was complete, it would recombine into an embryo, and then slowly give birth to a new Buddha-figure clone.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian actually only needed to open the deity talent, and the rest of the things were to cultivate the second deity with the deity talent himself, and there was no need for other control.

Therefore, Ye Tian began to cultivate while making the second deity, so that his cultivation would not be delayed.

In the blink of an eye, ten years had passed in the outside world, and under the acceleration of time, Ye Tian had already spent ten thousand years.

......

"It's finally going to work!"

Ye Tian looked at the gray embryo in front of him, and a figure appeared in the embryo, this figure was Ye Tian's second deity.

Suddenly.

A wave of turmoil rippled out, and the breath belonging to the second deity was completely revealed.

Ye Tian knew that the second deity had been successfully conceived, so he separated a part of his consciousness into the second deity.

"Open!"

Ye Tian manipulated the second deity to break the cultivation, and then the embryo shattered into countless pieces, and turned into a piece of clothing and attached to his second deity.

This garment is equivalent to the Companion Arcana, but it is too different from the real Companion Arcana, and its quality is only equivalent to the ordinary Arcana level.

"The second deity has just been conceived, and it is only equivalent to a galaxy-level cultivation, and it needs to be re-cultivated!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This can't be helped, after all, under the restrictions of the universe, the second deity is equivalent to a new being, and it has a galaxy-level cultivation just after birth, which is equivalent to some innate gods.

Therefore, if you want to quickly improve the strength of the second deity, you must cultivate again.

But with Ye Tian's consciousness as the leader, the cultivation of the second deity was not difficult, and it was easy to ascend.

So, Ye Tian began to cultivate.

The second deity also has talents, and the talents are very high, but there are not many types of talents, and compared to those children of the universe, the talents of the second deity are much worse.

Through the deity talent, Ye Tian knew that if he wanted the deity clone to have extremely high talent and more talents, he had to use a higher arcana, such as the strongest arcana.

But Ye Tian can only use the top-level treasure as the embryo of the second deity, so the talent is slightly worse, but this is not a matter for Ye Tian, he has killed many children of the universe, and also deprived them of their talent, and now he can give the second deity clone.

Therefore, the question of talent is not a problem at all.

Time flies, and a hundred years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation of the second deity had reached the peak realm of the cosmic god, and this was still Ye Tian's order to familiarize himself with the body of the second deity and consolidate the foundation at the galaxy level, otherwise he would have rushed into the realm of domination.

On this day, Ye Tian began to impact the Domination Realm.

Everything fell into place, Ye Tian rushed into the first order of the Domination very easily, and then used a large amount of resources to start accumulating cultivation.

Dominate the Second Order!

Juggernaut the Third Order!

Juggernaut the Fourth Order!

......

In just three hundred years, Ye Tian's second deity had successfully stepped into the peak realm of the ninth order, and he was only one step away from the realm of Tianzun.

"Although the second deity has reached the peak of the Domination Realm, the life level is still at the fourth level, and the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique and the Eighteen Golden Body Recipes don't have much time to cultivate, this second deity is not a real genius, even if he rushes into the Tianzun realm, I am afraid it will be difficult to have the supreme combat power. But it's okay, as long as you reach the realm of Heavenly Venerable, this second deity can refine the Desolate Lord Order. Once I refine the Desolate Master's Order, I can control the Desolate Realm, no matter how powerful that Desolate Venerable is, he can't compete with me in the Desolate Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he didn't care about the foundation of this second deity, anyway, in the future, this second deity would also be scrapped, and it was just a tool for him.

After slightly stabilizing the cultivation of the second deity dominating the peak realm, Ye Tian began to impact the Tianzun realm.

Impacting the Tianzun realm only needs to meet the mood conditions and talent conditions to impact, and he meets both conditions.

this day.

At the edge of the universe, Ye Tian began to choose to impact the Tianzun realm.

The Tianzun realm needs to place the soul on heaven and earth, and the second deity has a unique soul, but the consciousness is shared with the first deity, so the soul of the second deity and the soul of the first deity exist separately and will not affect each other, otherwise Ye Tian would not dare to cultivate the second deity.

"Open!"

Ye Tian impacted the Tianzun realm, and the huge soul was pinned on a special void in the universe, and the power of the universe origin was poured in, assisting Ye Tian to impact the Tianzun realm.

Soon, Ye Tian broke the shackles between the Domination and the Tianzun realm, and stepped into the Tianzun realm very easily.

As soon as he entered the realm of Tianzun, Ye Tian felt a different world.

It was as if he could control all the rules of heaven and earth, even if he didn't have some talents, he could control the rules corresponding to those talents.

It's like some supremes who don't have the talent of time and space can still manipulate time and space to resurrect people, but they just need to pay some price.

And at this time, Ye Tian also saw the long river of time and space hidden in the depths of the origin of the universe, and saw countless soul imprints struggling in the long river of time and space.

"This is Tianzun! However, it is only the realm of Tianzun, and he doesn't dare to involve the long river of time and space at all!"

Ye Tiandao.
